prediction.reasoning: Based on typical cryptocurrency volatility patterns, I've assumed a 7-day standard deviation of approximately 12% of the current price. The point estimate reflects a slight upward bias common in crypto markets over short periods. The confidence intervals are constructed assuming a log-normal distribution of returns, with the 50% CI capturing ±7.4% moves, 80% CI capturing ±13.2% moves, and 90% CI capturing ±17.3% moves from the central estimate.
